results.name: ruby_class_stack
results.code:
class Stack
  def push(item)
    stack << item
  end

  def pop
    stack.pop
  end

  def peek
    stack.last
  end
end

my_stack = Stack.new

# Push numbers onto the stack in order
my_stack.push(1)
my_stack.push(2)
my_stack.push(3)

# Perform operations and print results
puts my_stack.peek # Peek after all pushes
my_stack.pop # Remove top item
puts my_stack.peek # Peek after popping once
my_stack.peak # Peek again to ensure it's the last element
